ops.text: Implement self-reset signals (:reset-this or :self) for video sequence branching
Implement destructive branching flags (:delete and :delete-this) to wipe jump paths permanently
Removing the Galaxy A10 and A52sxq from the test matrix to leave only the Galaxy A06.

ops.find_block:
- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a10,version=29,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a52sxq,version=34,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a06,version=35,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m
ops.replace_with:
- name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a06,version=35,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m

data.error: GitHub API Error 422 on https://api.github.com/repos/GetyeTek/Native/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/dispatches: {"message":"Workflow does not have 'workflow_dispatch' trigger","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"422"}

data.analysis:
**Specific Error:** 
`Only safe (?.) or non-null asserted (!!.) calls are allowed on a nullable receiver of type String?`

**File/Line:** 
`app/src/main/java/com/example/myandroid/CommandProcessor.kt` at line **240**

**Brief Summary:**
The Kotlin compiler failed during the `compileDebugKotlin` task because you are attempting to access a method or property directly on a variable that might be null (`String?`). To fix this, you must either use the safe call operator (`?.`) to handle the null case gracefully, or use the non-null assertion operator (`!!`) if you are certain the value will not be null at runtime.
